_comment: LLM-MAINTAINED MODULE MAP for @argo/desktop. Single source of truth for module boundaries; .dependency-cruiser.cjs turns it into lint rules mechanically — edit this map, never the generated rules. Refresh when the src/ structure changes. Managed by the setup-module-boundaries skill.

modules.name: main
modules.comment: Electron main process. Its internals are private; the app is wired only from its own entry.

modules.name: preload
modules.comment: The context-bridge. Loaded by Electron via file path, not imported — nothing should import its internals.

modules.name: renderer
modules.comment: The UI (browser context). Talks to main only through the window bridge, never by import.

layers._comment: Electron process isolation: the three processes must never import each other at all — the only channels are the preload bridge (renderer↔main) and Electron's own preload wiring (main→preload by path). Importing across them is the classic footgun this locks out.
